sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95414" key="skwlobati/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκωλο-βᾰτίζω</orth>, <sense id="n95414.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">walk on stilts</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:112" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">112</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀσκωλιάζω</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
